description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the msrd0/gradle Docker image and defines two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs sudo apk add --no-cache protobuf, creates a .gradle directory, executes GRADLE_USER_HOME=.gradle gradle assemble, and publishes the build/, .gradle/, and src/generated/ directories as artifacts. In the test stage add a test_psql job that uses the postgres:alpine service, sets POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, and POSTGRES_USER variables, writes a PostgreSQL configuration file with echo -e 'db:
  type: postgres
  host: postgres
  name: matrix_appservice_signal
  user: postgres
  password: postgres' | sudo tee /etc/matrix-appservice-signal.yml, and runs GRADLE_USER_HOME=.gradle gradle test. Also add a test_sqlite job that writes a SQLite configuration file using echo -e 'db:
  type: sqlite3
  file: /tmp/test.db' | sudo tee /etc/matrix-appservice-signal.yml and runs GRADLE_USER_HOME=.gradle gradle test.
